title: Lovable metaMe Smart Menu parity brief — files + scope
body:
## Context
Lovable's smart menu system is more developed than the Next.js app's current implementation. The goal is to bring the Next.js metaMe runtime and ComposerStudio into parity with Lovable's menu patterns.

## What Lovable may freely edit

### Type definitions
- types/smartMenu.ts — MenuItem, MenuSection, SmartMenuConfig, MenuState, MenuContext
- types/smartDrawer.ts — DrawerSet, Drawer, DrawerTab, DrawerSlot, DrawerSession, VisibilityRules
- ui/smartLayout/types.ts — DrawerSize (6 variants), MenuMode (4 modes), SmartMenuBehavior

### UI Layout shell components
- ui/smartLayout/SmartDrawerShell.tsx
- ui/smartLayout/SmartMenuRail.tsx
- ui/smartLayout/drawerStyles.ts
- ui/smartLayout/index.ts

### Service layer
- services/menu/menuService.ts
- services/menu/fixtures/menuFixtures.ts
- services/drawer/drawerService.ts
- services/drawer/fixtures/drawerSetFixtures.ts
- services/drawer/visibilityEvaluator.ts
- services/drawer/slotDataResolver.ts
- services/drawer/cardVariantRegistry.ts
- services/drawer/modalSelectionService.ts
- services/drawer/smartTriadAdapter.ts
- services/drawer/index.ts

### Drawer rendering components
- components/drawer/SmartDrawerRenderer.tsx
- components/drawer/DrawerTabBar.tsx
- components/drawer/SlotRenderer.tsx
- components/drawer/AgentPanelRenderer.tsx

### Smart drawer editor
- components/smartDrawer/DrawerMenuList.tsx
- components/smartDrawer/DrawerDetailEditor.tsx
- components/smartDrawer/LivePreviewPanel.tsx
- components/smartDrawer/DynamicModeSelector.tsx
- components/smartDrawer/CopilotBar.tsx
- components/smartDrawer/ResizableLayout.tsx

### API routes
- app/api/menu/route.ts
- app/api/drawer/resolve/route.ts
- app/api/drawer/sets/route.ts
- app/api/drawer/sets/[id]/route.ts
- app/api/drawer/variants/route.ts
- app/api/drawer/modal-select/route.ts
- app/(shell)/copilot/actions/smartmenu.ts (stubs — safe to implement)

## Read-only reference (understand but DO NOT edit)

- components/metame/MetaMeRuntimeClient.tsx
  Read: lines 446-456 (menuPromptFromActionId), 1826-1827 (drawer state), 2076-2089 (MENU_ACTION send), 3079-3095 (MENU_ACTION receive), 3929-3975 (DRAWER_ACTION_HANDLERS), 4151-4287 (menu buttons)
  
- components/composer/ComposerStudio.tsx
  Read: lines 7713-7714 (NavMenu/WalletMenu props), 12987-12990 (RegistryBrowserDrawer)

## Strictly off-limits

- components/SubmenuDrawer.tsx
- app/components/content/SmartWalletDrawer.tsx
- components/AgentWalletDrawer.tsx
- packages/smartwallet/
- packages/smarttriad/
- services/campaign/
- services/aa-api/
- app/api/wallet/
- app/api/crm/
- app/api/runtime/
- supabase/migrations/
- scripts/
- data/
- .env.local / .env.local.temp

## Message contract (must preserve exactly)

MENU_ACTION message shape: { type: "MENU_ACTION", payload: { action_id?, item_id?, intent?, action? } }
DRAWER_ACTION_HANDLERS keys: "wallet" and "settings" — these bridge menu clicks to runtime drawer state.
